items.title: LLMs can inspect real video locally
items.oneliner: Local video pipeline picks scene-change frames and Whisper transcripts so any LLM can analyze footage without cloud upload.

items.title: Safari gets an MCP debugging bridge
items.oneliner: MCP server lets coding agents inspect Safari DOM, network, and performance directly instead of guessing from screenshots.

items.title: Rust compiler translated into portable C
items.oneliner: Build a working rustc with GCC and make, useful for obscure targets where LLVM toolchains are unavailable.

items.title: A new structured rich-text editor
items.oneliner: Open-source editor framework from ProseMirror's creator supports custom schemas, collaboration, accessibility, and extension-driven editing.

items.title: Vulkan is coming to NetBSD
items.oneliner: Beta repo scripts Mesa Lavapipe builds on fresh NetBSD installs, documenting every dependency and patch needed.

items.title: Postgres can run Commodore 64 BASIC
items.oneliner: This PostgreSQL procedural language executes Commodore 64 BASIC V2 functions with microsecond calls and built-in validation.

items.title: sqlite-utils adds real schema migrations
items.oneliner: Release candidate adds migrations and nested transactions, making Python SQLite apps easier to evolve safely.

items.title: Postgres workflows without partial failures
items.oneliner: Hands-on guide shows how colocating workflow state with app data makes retries atomic and idempotency far simpler.

items.title: ONNX embeddings got 14x faster
items.oneliner: Engineering writeup explains the rebuilt ONNX path that pushed embedding throughput to about 230 documents per second.

items.title: DSPy for SQL prompt evaluation
items.oneliner: Practical walkthrough shows how DSPy can evaluate and improve SQL system prompts for Datasette Agent.
